issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Egghead} type, not if Egghead card is on board. Should use LeaderHasType:Egghead
Missing condition: Life cards ≥ 2. Must add HasCardOnBoard or similar to verify 2+ Life cards
Action should add Character to top of Life cards face-up, not PlayFromHand. Should use AttachDon or custom Life-stacking action
Filter missing requirement: Character must have [Trigger] keyword
Second effect with trigger:Trigger and opponent character rest is unrelated to card text and should not exist

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Egghead} type and you have 2 or more Life cards, add up to 1 Character card with a [Trigger] from your hand to the top of your Life cards face-up.
